calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bing Xiao, claimant/judgment debtor, appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'s Hearing On Defendant's Claim Of Exemption. Defendant Bing Xiao's claim of exemption is granted. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. ORDER SIGNED. (Copies of the order were mailed to all parties.) Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To May-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Judge Miller is recused. Per order of the presiding judge, the claim of exemption is continued to be heard on May 7, 2014, before Judge Robertson sitting in Law and Motion Department 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Oppos
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is transferred to be heard on the law and motion calendar in room 302 at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
